description: Review radiology procedure definitions and exam orders in the VistA database using the YDBGui web interface. Radiology/Nuclear Medicine is a key clinical package in VistA, and auditing procedure definitions and existing orders is essential for operational compliance. Navigate to the Radiology globals in YDBGui to browse procedure definitions in the RAD/NUC MED PROCEDURES file (^RA(71)) and check for existing patient orders in the RAD/NUC MED ORDERS file (^RA(75.1)).
